_comment: Frontend endpoint references that intentionally have no core-be route YET. Each entry needs a reason; the gate (pnpm contracts:drift) fails when an entry becomes stale (the backend ships the route) so this list can only shrink toward zero.

entries.reason: The register page is committed product surface; core-be has no email/password registration route yet (auth is magic-link/OAuth-first). Re-point or remove when the backend decides.
